commands.build: cd <DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/WRF && timeout 3600 env PATH=<USER_HOME>/src/canairy_meteo/Gen2/artifacts/envs/wrf-build/bin:$PATH NETCDF=<USER_HOME>/src/canairy_meteo/Gen2/artifacts/envs/wrf-build PNETCDF=<USER_HOME>/src/canairy_meteo/Gen2/artifacts/envs/wrf-build WRFIO_NCD_LARGE_FILE_SUPPORT=1 CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES= JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu tcsh ./compile em_real ><DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/compile_full_pre_rk.log 2>&1
commands.run: ln -sf <DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/WRF/main/wrf.exe <DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/run_case3/wrf.exe && cd <DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/run_case3 && timeout 3600 env PATH=<USER_HOME>/src/canairy_meteo/Gen2/artifacts/envs/wrf-build/bin:$PATH CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES= JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 WRFGPU2_FULL_PRE_RK=1 WRFGPU2_FULL_PRE_RK_ROOT=<DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/full_pre_rk_output WRFGPU2_FULL_PRE_RK_GRID=2 WRFGPU2_FULL_PRE_RK_START_STEP=6000 WRFGPU2_FULL_PRE_RK_END_STEP=6000 mpirun --oversubscribe -np 28 ./wrf.exe ><DATA_ROOT>/wrf_gpu2/v014_full_pre_rk_savepoint_hook/run_case3/full_pre_rk_28rank_stdout.log 2>&1

MASS_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

MOIST_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

SCALAR_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

U_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

V_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

WPH_FULL.key_convention: MASS/U/V/WPH=(zero_k, zero_y, zero_x); MOIST/SCALAR=(index, zero_k, zero_y, zero_x)

routine: dyn_em/solve_em.F after grid%itimestep increment before current-step physics/RK
dyn_em/solve_em.F after grid%itimestep increment before current-step physics/RK

hook_sufficiency.reason: The exact post-itimestep step-entry boundary is before WRF computes current-step first_rk_step_part1/part2 physics tendencies and before rk_tendency zeroes/populates the save-family fields.

target.boundary: after grid%itimestep increment before current-step physics/RK
